reason: The missing hints (宣言、式、スクリプトレット、ディレクティブ、EL式) in s5 represent a minor retrieval gap. The s5 section content already contains the full configuration table for all 9 syntax/tag types, so the information is not missing — only the routing hints are incomplete. Additionally, several of these terms (スクリプトレット、ディレクティブ、EL式) already appear in s2 hints, meaning queries for these terms will still reach relevant content. The terms most at risk of failing retrieval (宣言、式) are low-frequency search terms for this topic. The section remains reachable via its distinctive hints: 設定ファイル記述方法、config.txt、デフォルト設定.

findings_assessment.justification: The five missing hint terms (宣言、式、スクリプトレット、ディレクティブ、EL式) do not block access to s5 content for two reasons. First, the s5 section body already contains the complete configuration table for all 9 syntax types — the information gap is in routing only. Second, スクリプトレット、ディレクティブ、EL式 are already present in s2 hints, so queries using these terms will still reach content within the same knowledge file. The highest-risk missing terms are 宣言 and 式, which appear nowhere else in the hints index, but these are uncommon standalone search queries for JSP static analysis configuration. Phase E logs are empty, indicating the fix step was not executed or produced no output — the finding persisted due to a process gap rather than a content dispute.
